extract.name: Services (Shift U)
extract.summary: A services hub page presenting six offerings (Landing Pages, Full Website, Google and Meta Ads, AI Chat Agent, Voice Agent, Conversion System) that connect a business's site, ads and AI into one revenue loop. Each service has fixed scope, written deadlines, a start price, and a delivery timeline. Clients can start with one service and stack more as revenue earns it.
extract.tagline: Six services, one revenue loop across your site, your ads and your AI.
extract.pricing: Landing Pages: $350 one-time. Full Website: 3 to 10 pages quoted by scope (shown as "Quoted"). Google and Meta Ads: $300 per month, plus ad spend. AI Chat Agent: $150 to $250 per month. Voice Agent: per seat quoted by call volume (shown as "Per seat"). Conversion System: quoted (site plus CRM plus attribution). Side-by-side "Fixed start price" row: Landing Pages $350, Full Website Quoted, Ads $300/mo, Chat Agent $150/mo, Voice Agent Per seat, Conversion System Quoted.
included: Landing Pages: One conversion page, fully written and designed
Landing Pages: Custom design system tuned to your brand
Landing Pages: Form, analytics and tracking wired in
Landing Pages: Mobile speed under 2 seconds
Full Website: Three to ten pages, shared design system
Full Website: SEO foundation across every page
Full Website: CMS or static, whichever fits your team
Full Website: Launch checklist and post-launch support
Google and Meta Ads: Account build, audiences and creative
Google and Meta Ads: Conversion tracking on your site and CRM
Google and Meta Ads: Weekly optimization, monthly written report
Google and Meta Ads: Month to month, cancel anytime
AI Chat Agent: Trained on your offers, pricing and FAQs
AI Chat Agent: Lead capture, qualification and routing
AI Chat Agent: Calendar booking and CRM handoff
AI Chat Agent: Monthly conversation review and tuning
Voice Agent: Inbound voice agent on your business line
Voice Agent: Custom voice, script and objection handling
Voice Agent: Booking, transfer and warm handoff
Voice Agent: Call recordings, transcripts and analytics
Conversion System: Site and pages aligned to one conversion path
Conversion System: CRM unified with your ads and inbox
Conversion System: Attribution from first touch to closed won
Conversion System: Quarterly read-out tied to revenue, not clicks
keyPoints: Hero headline: Six services, one revenue loop across your site, your ads and your AI.
Section: WHAT WE SHIP - intro: Six services, fixed scope, written deadlines.
Landing Pages tagline: A single conversion page built around one offer, one audience and one action.
Full Website tagline: Three to ten pages designed end to end.
Google and Meta Ads tagline: Paid acquisition managed monthly with attribution baked in.
AI Chat Agent tagline: A chat agent trained on your business, deployed on your site.
Voice Agent tagline: AI calls and bookings handled around the clock.
Conversion System tagline: Site, CMS and attribution tied into one revenue loop.
WHY THIS STACK section quote (Joshua, Sales and Discovery Lead): A page without ads dies quietly. Ads without a page light money on fire. The stack is the win, not any single piece of it.
SIDE BY SIDE section intro: Pick the service that closes the leak you have today.

Delivery timelines: Landing Pages live in under 7 business days; Full Website two to four weeks, scoped at kickoff; Ads live in 5 business days from kickoff; Chat Agent trained and live in 5 business days; Voice Agent trained and live in 10 business days; Conversion System four to eight weeks, scoped at kickoff.
Secondary CTAs / buttons: Book a discovery call | See pricing | Explore [Service Name]
Side-by-side comparison columns: Live in under 7 days, Custom design system, Lead capture and routing, Attribution to revenue, Calendar booking, 24/7 coverage.

Stacking model: most clients start with a landing page or an ad account, prove a return, then add chat, voice and the full conversion system as revenue earns it; every service is built to plug in cleanly on day one or six months in.
proof: Testimonial / quote from Joshua, Sales and Discovery Lead: 'A page without ads dies quietly. Ads without a page light money on fire. The stack is the win, not any single piece of it.'
Stated performance claim: Landing page mobile speed under 2 seconds
No star ratings, client counts, or numeric metrics were present on the page
faq: Q: Can I start with one service and stack more later? A: Yes. Most clients start with either a landing page or an ad account, prove a return, then add chat, voice and the full conversion system as revenue earns it. Every service is built to plug in cleanly on day one or six months in.
Q: Do you require a long contract? (answer collapsed / not rendered in page HTML)
Q: Who owns the work after delivery? (answer collapsed / not rendered in page HTML)
Q: What if I am not sure which service I need? (answer collapsed / not rendered in page HTML)
Q: Do you work outside Edmonton or Alberta? (answer collapsed / not rendered in page HTML)
extract.capgRemoved: Stripped the following grant/funding content found on the page: (1) The FAQ question "How does the Canada-Alberta Job Grant apply here?" and its (collapsed) answer were removed entirely. (2) The verbatim claim "The Canada-Alberta Job Grant covers up to 66 percent of AI training, with up to $10,000 per trainee per year" and the phrase "funded through 2028" were removed. (3) The "CAJG eligible when paired with training" column/row in the SIDE BY SIDE comparison table was removed from the included/comparison content. (4) Any "Alberta operators / grant-eligible" framing was excluded. The underlying services and their real prices ($350 Landing Pages, $300/mo Ads, $150 to $250/mo Chat Agent, plus the quoted/per-seat items) and timelines were kept intact; only the grant-funding wrapper was removed.

copy.seoDescription: Websites, WhatsApp AI agents, and automations that bring more leads and less manual work. One team, built and supported end to end.

sections.headline: Your site and the AI behind it
sections.subhead: One team builds the website, the WhatsApp agent, and the automations that run after launch.
sections.body: Good tech, real results. More leads coming in, less manual work going out.

sections.headline: Five ways we move your business
sections.subhead: Pick one or stack them. Everything connects under one roof.
bullets: Websites & Landing Pages: built once or as a monthly subscription, no big upfront.
WhatsApp AI Agents: answers, qualifies, and books appointments 24/7.
Business Automations: connect your tools and kill the manual busywork.
Paid Ads & Marketing: Meta and Google campaigns that bring real leads.
Branding: identity, logo, and a system that looks the part.

sections.headline: Built, connected, and supported
sections.subhead: The three reasons clients stop shopping around.
bullets: Site plus AI under one roof, no juggling vendors.
Website-as-a-Service: pay monthly, cancel anytime, no big upfront.
Fast to launch, and we stay on after go-live.

sections.headline: Tell us where you lose leads
sections.subhead: Fifteen minutes. We map the site, agent, or automation that fixes it.
sections.body: No pressure, no jargon. You leave the call knowing exactly what to build first.
